  - Seq 19: 99999999999999 - DEXTROSE 5% + 0.9% SODIUM CHLORIDE INFUSION / 5, 0.9 % / Infusion* / 500ml x 1 (SAR 6.85)

  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
